claim_boundary: This receipt verifies prompt-file based Kiro invocation targeting opus-4.8 with design-only/no-edit and no-readiness-closure prompt boundaries. It does not claim readiness closure, file edits, model credential validity, or headless design-output capture.
output_capture_boundary: The Kiro CLI launches a chat session, but this wrapper does not receive a machine-readable design brief on stdout. Treat this receipt as launch evidence only, not as proof that Kiro produced or Codex consumed a design.
